The Day After Tomorrow (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $186,740,799Details
International Box Office $369,099,318
Worldwide Box Office $555,840,117
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$68,743,584 (36.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.72 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:33.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$125,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,425 opening theaters/3,444 max. theaters, 5.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $359,648,945

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 28th, 2004 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: May 27th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: October 12th, 2004 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense situations of peril
Running Time: 123 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Visual Effects
Plot point: Academics, Disaster, Rescue, Extreme Weather
Social setting: End of the World
Subgenre: Survival Adventure
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Centropolis Entertainment, Lionsgate, The Mark Gordon Company
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
